---
name: Feature request
about: A capability you'd want this package to have
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the current API makes hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see — a new function, an option on an existing
function, a new module? Include a sketch of the API shape if you have
one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional context

Links to relevant paper sections, Hash4j features, or other prior art
are useful — they short-circuit a lot of design discussion.
